text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Admitted for fever for three days, no cough, mild dyspnea.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "Does not know if stranguria due to neuropathy, but reports concentrated and foul-smelling urine over the past few days.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "Past Medical History: Arterial hypertension CAD DM type 2 CRI secondary to diabetic nephropathy - kidney-pancreas transplant in 2001 -> rejection has biological mitral valve prosthesis previous myomectomy for uterine fibroid in November 2018 hospitalization for acute abscessed pyelonephritis (K.pneumoniae, E.faecium in urine) and continued therapy with Ivanz until 1/14/2019, with indication to perform TT echocardiogram cehck-up for severe TI - kidney transplant 5/24/2018 Therapy: tacrolimus 0.5mg 1 tablet (?), deltacortene 5 mg 1 tablet - bisoprolol 5mg 1/2 tablet, pantoprazole 40-lasix 25 mg 1 tablet x3 - lasitone 1 tablet -calcitriol 0.25mg 1 tablet - folin 5 mg - zyloric 150 - cardioASA, coumadin, anti-rejection drug administered at Molinette No known allergies PHONE_NUMBER", 0.0, 1.0)
